sections.heading: Syntax
Options
sections.body:
`exists` uses the following terms to construct a query:

| Field | Type   | Description                                                                                                                                      | Required? |
| ----- | ------ | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ | --------- |
| path  | string | Indexed field to search.                                                                                                                         | yes       |
| score | object | Score to assign to matching search results. To learn more about the options to modify the default score, see Score the Documents in the Results. | no        |

sections.heading: Scoring Behavior
sections.body:
MongoDB Search assigns a [constant](scoring-constant) score of `1` for all the
documents in the result set. You can customize the default MongoDB Search score
using the `score` options. To learn more about modifying the default
score returned by MongoDB Search, see [Modifying](scoring-options).

sections.heading: Examples
sections.body:
You can try the following examples in the MongoDB Search Playground or your
cluster.

sections.heading: Sample Collection
Sample Index
sections.body:
The `fruit` collection has a default [dynamic mappings](static-dynamic-mappings) MongoDB Search index that uses the default
[standard analyzer](ref-standard-analyzer) analyzer. The `standard`
analyzer lower-cases all words and disregards common stop words
(`"the", "a", "and",` etc).
